text: No substitutions  for  equipment  or  materials  are  permitted  unless  approved  by  the  Architect  / Engineer,  Contractor  and  AHJ  (when  applicable)  through  the  requirements  for  substitution included in the Contract Documents. The Contractor reserves the right to modify the substitution process  at  any  time  as  required  to  satisfy  the  requirement  of  the  Architect  /  Engineer  and  the Contractor. The Subcontractor shall be responsible for the effect of a substitution on the Project, related work, and scheduled impacts. The Subcontractor shall pay all additional costs generated by substitution,  including  costs  of  the  Architect,  Engineer,  Contractor,  approved  testing  and inspection, other incidentals and/or any other trade Subcontractor costs. The burden of proving that the proposed substitute product is equal to the specified product is upon the Subcontractor.
